visualization.name: Embedding Atlas
visualization.description: Interactive embedding with clustering and search
visualization.help:
# What is Embedding Atlas?
**Embedding Atlas** is an interactive visualization tool from Apple for exploring large embedding datasets. It renders millions of points with kernel density estimation, automatic clustering and labeling, and real-time nearest-neighbor search, with linked dashboards for cross-filtering by metadata.
For best performance, use a **WebGPU-capable browser** such as recent **Chrome** or **Chromium**.
## Input columns
The plugin looks for these columns (case-insensitive) and falls back if they're missing:
- **`x`, `y`** (or `UMAP_1`/`UMAP_2`, `tsne_1`/`tsne_2`, `longitude`/`latitude`) — 2D projection. Fallback: first two numeric columns. - **`id`** / `identifier` / `index` — point identifier. Fallback: row number. - **`text`** / `label` / `name` / `title` / `description` — drives tooltip and search.
Any other columns become metadata for coloring, filtering, and faceting.
At least two numeric columns are required.
## Key features
- **Density-aware rendering**: kernel density contours separate dense regions from outliers. - **Automatic clustering and labels**: navigate structure without pre-computing clusters. - **Real-time search**: find similar points by query or by example. - **Linked dashboards**: bar, line, bubble, and other charts cross-filter the embedding view. - **Multimodal metadata**: text, image, audio, numeric, categorical, and time columns are rendered with appropriate viewers.
To learn more about Embedding Atlas, visit: [https://apple.github.io/embedding-atlas](https://apple.github.io/embedding-atlas)
